strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No advanced degree or formal AI/ML research background
Limited demonstrated AI product or platform leadership at scale
Title and scope (Senior/Staff IC) below Director-level Principal expectations
response.justification: The candidate brings broad, hands-on engineering experience across many stacks and domains, with founder-level initiative via GISCollective and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling. However, the resume lacks the recognized AI expertise, large-scale AI product leadership, and director-level IC scope typically expected for a Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy.
